name: Everock, Inc.
summary: Everock, Inc. produces and sells sandwich spreads and dips for delis, restaurants, cafeterias, and club stores. It offers vegetable dishes and gourmet sandwich spreads. The company sells its products online for customers in the United States and internationally. Everock, Inc. was formerly known as Nature's Peak, Inc. and changed its name to Everock, Inc. in July 2009. The company is based in Santa Cruz, California.
